chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-296 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 08-09-2025 Miss. Mehran Abdullah Jagirani Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, assisted by Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General. -------- Mr. Muhammad Qasim Khan files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.8 and 9. During the course, the official respondents have filed their replies wherein they have stated that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the case in wake of the statements. The petition stands disposed of with directions to respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with the law and do not cause any harassment to the petitioner. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
